data.content: Implemented retry outcome fixes for take-loop execution. Success classification now only counts transitions to the next queue or the queue prior to the claimed state, with explicit coverage for same-queue and terminal outcomes. Agent outcome stats remain written under the app working directory and the helper now accepts an explicit base dir for stable tests. Validation: bun run test passed (2089 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo); bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run build passed; bun run lint . completed with existing repository warnings only, no lint errors.
